allow: PowerShell(python -c "from google.generativeai import types; print\([x for x in dir\(types\) if 'config' in x.lower\(\) or 'image' in x.lower\(\) or 'modal' in x.lower\(\)]\)")
PowerShell(python -c "from google.genai import types; attrs = [x for x in dir\(types\) if 'image' in x.lower\(\) or 'modal' in x.lower\(\) or 'config' in x.lower\(\)]; print\(attrs[:40]\)")
PowerShell(python -c "from google.genai import types; attrs = [x for x in dir\(types\) if 'generate' in x.lower\(\) or 'ImageGen' in x or 'ResponseModal' in x]; print\(attrs\)")
PowerShell(python -c "from google.genai import types; help\(types.GenerateContentConfig\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell(python -c "from google.genai import types; help\(types.ImageConfig\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20)
